config.title: Basic Configuration
config.subtitle: How will you access Yuvomi?
config.existing: Existing configuration detected — your current .env file will be backed up before saving.
config.hostHint: The address you'll use to open Yuvomi in your browser.
config.errHost: Invalid hostname. Use only letters, digits, hyphens and dots.
config.errPort: Invalid port. Must be a number between 1 and 65535.
config.prereqMissing: Missing prerequisites: {{list}}. Please install them and reload this page.

secrets.title: Security Keys
secrets.subtitle: These protect your session and encrypt the database.
secrets.dbHint: Encrypts the SQLite database at rest.
secrets.dangerWarn: Save these keys now. If you lose them, your encrypted data is unrecoverable — there is no reset.

weather.title: Weather Widget
weather.subtitle: Live weather on the dashboard — free, no account, no API key.
weather.coordHint: Find coordinates on openstreetmap.org or Google Maps.

calendar.title: Calendar Sync
calendar.subtitle: Connect Yuvomi to Google Calendar or Apple iCloud. Both optional — expand to configure.
calendar.googleHint: Create OAuth credentials at {{link}}. Redirect URI: {{redirect}}
calendar.googleSelectNote: After connecting, you can choose which calendar to sync in the app settings (default: primary calendar).
calendar.appleUrlHint: Leave empty unless your provider uses a different CalDAV endpoint.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Check your settings before writing .env and starting the container.
review.finalNote: This writes your .env (an existing one is backed up) and starts the container.

docker.title: Starting Yuvomi
docker.subtitle: Pulling the image and starting the Docker container.

admin.title: Create Admin Account
admin.subtitle: Set up your first login. This account has full access to Yuvomi.
admin.errPass: Password must be at least 8 characters.

done.title: Yuvomi is ready!
done.subtitle: Your family planner is running and your admin account is set up.
done.backupReminder: Remember to back up your .env file now — it holds your keys.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.subtitle: Reverse proxy, single sign-on and automatic backups. All optional — skipping is safe.
advanced.proxyBehindHttps: Behind a reverse proxy with HTTPS (Caddy, nginx, Traefik)
advanced.proxyHint: When unsure choose “Reverse proxy”: it enforces secure cookies. Pick “Direct” only for local HTTP access without HTTPS.
advanced.oidcHint: Fill in all four fields to enable SSO, or leave them empty.
advanced.errOidc: OIDC requires all four fields or none.
advanced.backupScheduleHint: When to run backups. Default: daily at 2 AM.
advanced.documentWebdavHint: Non-empty environment values override the corresponding settings stored in the database.
advanced.documentWebdavPathHint: Remote folder for document files. Leave empty to use yuvomi-documents.
advanced.documentLocalEnable: Store new documents in a local folder
advanced.documentLocalPathHint: Path inside the container. Leave empty to use /documents.
advanced.errSchedule: Invalid cron schedule (expected five space-separated fields, e.g. 0 2 * * *).
advanced.errKeep: Backups to keep must be a positive number.
advanced.webdavBackupHint: Copy each backup to a WebDAV server (e.g. Nextcloud) so it survives a disk failure.
advanced.fixerHint: Optional. Converts subscription currencies with live rates. Subscriptions work without it.
advanced.pushSubjectHint: Sent to push services as a contact for your server. Leave empty to use the default.
advanced.documentGoogleDriveHint: Configure OAuth credentials here, then connect and explicitly select Google Drive in Document settings after installation.
advanced.documentGoogleDriveReuseHint: Leave both empty to reuse your Google Calendar OAuth credentials. To use dedicated ones, create them in the Google Cloud Console (as in the Calendar step).
advanced.errDocumentGoogleDrivePair: Google Drive client ID and secret must both be set or both be empty.
advanced.errDocumentGoogleDriveCredentials: Google Drive requires either its own client ID and secret or configured Google Calendar credentials.

welcome.title: Welcome to Yuvomi
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your private family planner running. Choose how you'd like to set it up.
welcome.simpleDesc: We handle the technical details for you. Perfect for running Yuvomi at home.
welcome.advancedDesc: Full control: reverse proxy, calendar sync, email, single sign-on and backups.

simple.title: Ready to go
simple.subtitle: We've prepared everything with safe defaults. Just create your account next.
simple.itemKeysDesc: Your session and database are encrypted automatically.
simple.itemBackupsDesc: A local backup is kept every night.
simple.backupReminder: After setup, back up the generated .env file — it holds your only encryption keys.
simple.switchAdvanced: Need more options? Switch to advanced setup

email.title: Email & Password Reset
email.subtitle: Let family members reset a forgotten password by email. Optional — skip if you don't need it.
email.hint: Uses your own SMTP server (mailbox provider, self-hosted, or a transactional service).
email.fromHint: The "from" address recipients will see. Many providers require it to match your username.
email.errIncomplete: SMTP server and sender address are required.
